tests.name: real status server normalizes legacy non-boolean status text to false
real status server normalizes non-boolean statuses in POST /status payloads
real status server accepts boolean-like running payload variants
real status server preserves true status while an active request is tracked
real status server persists aggregate metrics and exposes them from GET /status
real status server starts managed llama.cpp during server startup before serving requests and reports idle after ready
managed llama live stream logs flush after idle without model request release
real status server abandons stale running request instead of returning busy
real status server accepts deferred summary artifacts on terminal posts and drains them after responding
managed llama scripts no longer receive status-path coordination args or env vars
real status server ignores legacy non-boolean status text when starting managed llama.cpp
real status server reports idle false while managed llama stays ready
real status server fails closed during startup when managed llama logs contain warnings
real status server ignores transient Loading model 503 startup log lines
real status server keeps running in degraded mode when managed llama startup is broken
real status server clears a stale managed llama process during startup before serving requests
real status server falls back to zeroed metrics when the metrics cache is invalid
real status server resets metrics when metrics schema is outdated
real status server accumulates provider payload totals across a chunked request while counting one completed request
real status server aggregates task-scoped tool stats and tool tokens
real status server patches speculative acceptance onto an existing repo-search run log row
real status server suppresses intermediate false log for single-step completed requests
real status server logs intermediate false line for first chunked leaf step
real status server logs explicit chunk failures and clears them before the next request
real status server marks a stale active request as abandoned when a new request id starts
